basic_info.headline: Agentic Safety @ Anthropic | ex-TIDAL/Twitter
basic_info.about: Hands-on machine learning engineer with extensive experience in end-to-end ML pipelines, from scalable data engineering (Hadoop, Spark) to cutting-edge model development (Transformers, LLMs, Audio Processing, Deep Learning). Expertise in deploying production-grade models at scale (APIs, event streaming, batch processing) and designing impactful systems that integrate ML models into user-facing experiences, including audio embeddings, content personalization, and recommendation systems.

location.full: New York, New York, United States

experience.title: Senior Machine Learning Engineer
experience.location: New York, New York, United States
experience.description:
Working on music recommendation & content understanding in the Personalization team.

- Led development of TIDAL’s first content understanding audio model using Meta’s open-source
pretrained MusicGen model, enabling audio embeddings extraction without reliance on user
interaction data. Achieved near-parity performance with production collaborative filtering models
in track similarity evaluations. Model is currently patent-pending under Block.

- Designed and deployed a non-music classification model leveraging CNNs with audio
spectrogram inputs to identify non-music content (e.g., white noise, nature sounds). Collaborated
closely with the Content team to align requirements and ensure operational accuracy. The model
achieved >90% precision and recall, serving as the primary production filter for royalty payouts
and content recommendations.

experience.title: Senior Machine Learning Engineer
experience.description: Working with Health ML team on reducing the amplification of toxic content to ensure twitter is a safe place to engage public conversation.

experience.title: Machine Learning Engineer / Data Scientist
experience.description:
- Prototyped supervised and unsupervised machine learning models for fraud detection, audience attributes prediction, audience targeting, CTR prediction

- Developed an impression estimation API, to compute the cardinality in any given subset less than 1s. Techniques include HyperLogLog / MinHash, and sparse Bitmap on Redis. (Node.js, Redis, Lua)

- Main contributor in data engineering team’s ETL codebase using Luigi module, implemented / deployed over 50 data flows in production. (Python, Luigi)

- Benchmarked the CTR prediction model using Vowpal-Wabbit library, combined with a Hive UDF to train and update the model in a distributed fashion. (Java)

- Built the backend APIs for content marketing team (native contents on social media platform) to provide a real-time optimization on budget allocation and dynamic CPC. (Python Flask)

- Front-end UIUX design in JS with frameworks like React

- Built the caching layer using Redis or Memcached for offline model population.

education.activities: New York Open Statistical Programming Meetup

education.degree: Bachelor of Business Administration (BBA), Operations Research

projects.name: Gender Classification of Social Media Text
projects.description:
The objective of this project was to classify the gender of social media based text by implementing
several well-known machine-learning algorithms such as Naïve Bayes, SVM, Ridge and LASSO
regression, as well as a method of combining Association Rules, a classic data mining technique,
with the Naïve Bayes model. We will be considering two separate data sources, Facebook posts
and Yelp restaurant reviews

projects.name: Healthcare Contracting Analyst Programmer Internship
projects.description: We are building mathematical models for hospital contracts and clinical and financial data analysis using Python and its broad scientific computing libraries. We are exploring machine learning and advanced statistical applications to this work.
